# KeyboardOff

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::KeyboardOff;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        KeyboardOff { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
unkeys, layout, spell, settings, mouse

## Categories
devices, text, development

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/keyboard-off)
